text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I stretch for a few minutes, then I have a glass of water and a light breakfast. After that, I take a quick shower and get ready for work. My work starts at 9 AM, and I usually have a busy morning with meetings and tasks. I take a short lunch break around noon, often eating a simple meal at my desk. In the late afternoon, I go for a 30-minute run or do some yoga to stay active. Evenings are for relaxing—I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a series. I make sure to go to bed by 10 PM to keep a consistent routine.
